assumption: Exit classifier rule-based accuracy is sufficient for production monitoring
risk: If accuracy is very low (<50%), monitoring data will be too noisy to derive useful insights or build reliable training labels
resolution_plan: Measure classification distribution over first 1000 exits. If UNKNOWN_EXIT >40%, halt deployment and expand taxonomy.

assumption: CEX deposit address list is comprehensive enough for initial deployment
risk: New CEX deposit addresses created frequently; may misclassify CEX deposits as transfers
resolution_plan: Monitor transfer destinations for high fan-in patterns that suggest uncatalogued CEX addresses. Build automated CEX address discovery.
